transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling CareLine Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a physical therapist I found is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Renata. I see you're on the Bright Horizon Silver PPO plan. What's the provider's name or clinic?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's Lakeview Physical Therapy on Grant Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One moment... yes, Lakeview Physical Therapy is in-network with your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, that's a relief. Will I still have a copay?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, your plan shows a thirty dollar copay per visit for outpatient therapy.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that works for me. Thanks for checking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Renata. Anything else I can help with today?
